title: Command Injection
description: NetTools wraps ping/dig with a weak metachar blacklist. Break out of the wrapper and read /flag.txt.

hints.text: The blacklist strips ; | & — but not $() or backticks.
Try /ping?host=1.1.1.1$(cat${IFS}/flag.txt) — but ${IFS} contains $, careful. Pipe substitution via $() still works: $(cat /flag.txt) — and the / and . survive the filter.
